title: F Server Pack
description: A Minecraft mod that disables the requirement for server ressource packs
body:
# F Server Pack
### A Minecraft mod that disables the requirement for server resource packs

Works with all fabric version, I think

Source code : [view view view view view view free!!!!!!](https://github.com/veski-dev/f-server-pack)

## Warning !!!

#### You should put "disable" or "prompt" inside "Server Ressources Packs" setting, before connecting to a server, otherwise it will apply the server ressource pack.

![Put Disable or Prompt](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/veski-dev/fserverpack/master/resources/warning.png)

## Features !
![Even if server resource pack is required, you can choose!!](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/veski-dev/fserverpack/master/resources/info.png)

| Version | Tested | cowpoop column   | cowpoop column          | cowpoopcolumn 3         |
|---------|--------|-------------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| 1.20.1  | yes    | java version 17   | every fabric api         | every fabric api         |
| 1.19.4  | yes    | java version 17   | every fabric api version | every fabric api         |
| 1.18.2  | yes    | java version 16+1 | every fabric api         | every fabric api version |
